creator: freebsd@deman.com
text:
Gotcha, I now realize I never ran the 'init' - hence probably a good =
assortment of problems.

I ended up doing the install on CentOS 5.6 instead, will give the =
FreeBSD port a whirl another time, but that would be weeks/months in the =
future.

I presume it would be best to close this out since almost assuredly the =
problem I ran into was from not doing the zenoss 'init'.

- Mike
